violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Packaged food item stored in undrained ice and/or food was subject to entry of water. - Bag of cheese and metal bowl of salsa floating in pan of melted ice, in prep cooler.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Salsa stored in an uncovered bowl and opened bag of cheese in prep cooler. All food items need to be in a container with a proper lid. Labeled and dated.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Filter above grilling table in need of cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Floors noted as having cracks and will need to be sealed.
